steps.title: Clear the equations
steps.content: The first equation simplifies to $5x-14y=-\frac{32}{7}$. The second equation simplifies to $5x-4py=8$. For no solution, the coefficient pairs must be proportional and the constants must be different.

steps.title: Match the y-coefficients
steps.content: The $x$-coefficients are both $5$, so the scale factor is $1$. Therefore the $y$-coefficients must match: $$-14=-4p$$ so $$p=\frac{14}{4}=\frac{7}{2}=3.5$$ Desmos can solve that coefficient match directly.

steps.title: Confirm no solution
steps.content: With $p=3.5$, both equations have the same left side, $5x-14y$, but their constants are $-\frac{32}{7}$ and $8$. The lines are parallel and distinct, so the system has no solution. The answer is 3.5.
